title: cascabela alliodora
intro: Cascabela alliodora, also known as the yellow oleander, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Americas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and anti-inflammatory compounds, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments. The health benefits of Cascabela alliodora include lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat conditions such as hypertension, fever, and skin conditions.
